title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina Part 4: Second cDNA Strand Synthesis
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol is part 4 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. This protocol adds the required reagents for the cDNA second strand synthesis
steps_raw: This protocol is part 4 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. This protocol adds the required reagents for the cDNA second strand synthesis
Temperature module cools down to 4 C (this can be done manually prior to protocol start)
8 uL of reaction buffer is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 1 to all samples
4 uL of enzyme mix is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 3 to all samples then mixed to combine
48 ul of nuclease free water is added to each sample from slot 4, column 12 then mixed
Protocol is complete, OT-2 will flash to alert user
keywords: NEBNext® Ultra™ II Directional RNA Library Prep
materials_raw: Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Generic PCR Strip 200 µL
